reference: Well, there are only three modalities of treatment: chemotherapy, radiation, and monoclonal antibody therapy. Now, after receiving a transplant, you definitely need to be visiting your doctor as compliance has to be checked. So trust the treatment.
text: Well, there are only three modalities of treatment: chemotherapy, radiation, and monoclonal antibody therapy. Now, after receiving a transplant, you definitely need to be visiting your doctor as compliance has to be checked. So trust the treatment.
